creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
You have to save this for your next croissant and coffee sesh! 🤎🥐☕️

This is one of viral things that I’ve been wanting to try for so long! So when I was finally allowed to dine out and meet friends, I instantly planned for a GIANT croissant and coffee date at @bakerist_uae!

I prebooked the giant combo. There are different croissant flavors but I chose the classic chocolate and paired it with latte. 

We looooove that despite of its gigantic size, the croissant is flaky and crisp on the outside. It’s puffy inside with soft layers and creamy filling! It’s for 8 people to share, so we had a huge portion for take away! 😋

Tag your fam and friends! 

#giantcroissant #dubaicafe #dubaireels #dubairestaurants #mydubai #ladyandhersweetescapes

transcription.text: Today I wanted to eat a croissant, so I went to a place that sells croissants, and I bought a croissant, and I returned home with the croissant, and then I ate the croissant.
